reviewer: agent matrix pass (headless Chrome, real inference verified end-to-end) — revision 1

rubric.evidence: Real q8 WASM inference verified end-to-end on a no-GPU runner via ?auto across all pages: main text->image 'a dog on the grass' ranks dog #1 (cos 0.073); basics 'a mountain landscape' ranks mountains #1 (0.061); practical image->text tags the dog photo 'a dog' top (29.6%); multi-model retrieves the dog then ViT-GPT2 captions 'a dog is tied to a rope by a fence' (grounded — the photo has a fence). 0 console errors, 0 failed requests.
rubric.notes: Two aligned towers (nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 + nomic-embed-text-v1.5) loaded via AutoModel/AutoProcessor/AutoTokenizer in models/nomic-embed-vision-v1-5/worker.js; embeddings L2-normalised in the worker.

rubric.evidence: Output is a fixed-length 768-d embedding per image (CLS token of last_hidden_state) and per text (mean-pooled), unit-normalised. Cross-modal ranking is decisive and correct on the diverse gallery (dog/mountains/fruit/bicycle/city queries each surface the right image). See-inside shows the real 768-d vector fingerprint + exact cosine table.
rubric.notes: Semantic sanity confirmed against real output; the 'search_query:'/'search_document:' Nomic prefixes are applied.

rubric.evidence: At-a-glance declares both model ids (nomic-ai/nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 + nomic-embed-text-v1.5, linked), task (image-feature-extraction + text feature-extraction), backend (WebAssembly), quantisation (q8), output dim (768-d, L2-normalised), and license (Apache-2.0). Inference off the main thread (new Worker).

Loads through shared createModelLoader auto-init; verified the fresh-profile Download->downloading->ready path (vision then text tower), followed by an automatic one-time gallery indexing pass. Per-model clear-cache control present.
rubric.notes: auto-init-on-cached is manual-evidenced; the Download path + progress were verified directly.

rubric.evidence: role=status aria-live region announces checking/downloading/indexing/ready/error; indexing + search errors surface on the page (status .err); loader Retry path present. WASM path needs no WebGPU (runs on the no-GPU runner).
rubric.notes: honest-progress-retry-offline + runs-without-webgpu-fallback manual-evidenced; download + indexing progress verified.

rubric.evidence: Every control verified: search box + Enter, example chips, Text<->Image mode toggle, gallery tiles as image queries (keyboard-focusable buttons), upload/drop, label-phrase box (practical), two poles (wild), two loaders (multi-model). All labelled, keyboard-operable, ~40-44px targets.

All visible output (rankings, scores, cosine table, embedding fingerprint, tags, axis positions, retrieved image + caption) is computed from the on-device embeddings; no canned results. Verified across all five pages via ?auto.

All content/gallery images carry alt text; all buttons (tiles, chips, mode toggle) have accessible names (conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names pass); live regions announce state; visible focus outlines on tiles and inputs.

responsive-check: desktop clean · mobile clean. Measured 0px document overflow at desktop (1280×800) AND mobile (360×740, DPR3) on the main page + all four use-case pages, including AFTER a search populates ranks/table (fixed a 41px mobile overflow by making the 3-column See-inside table share width instead of forcing 7.5rem columns). pre blocks scroll internally.
rubric.notes: Both classes flipped to ok on real agent evidence + screenshots.

rubric.evidence: Both towers run in a Web Worker; embeddings are L2-normalised in the worker so main-thread ranking is a handful of 768-d dot products. The gallery is embedded once, then each query re-embeds only the text (or reuses a cached image vector).
rubric.notes: inp-stays-low manual-evidenced; off-thread inference + cheap main-thread cosine verified.

guidanceConsulted.query: run inference off the main thread in a web worker
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Keep heavy work off the main thread.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — both embedding towers run in models/nomic-embed-vision-v1-5/worker.js; vectors are L2-normalised there and transferred back, so the page only does cheap dot-product ranking. conformance inference-off-main-thread passes.

guidanceConsulted.query: responsive control panel and results grid without horizontal overflow
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Fluid, contained layout; intrinsic sizing; wide tables share/scroll, never force page width.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — gallery uses grid auto-fill minmax(130px,1fr); at-a-glance table uses table-layout:fixed with a fixed label column only (.glance-table th:first-child); the See-inside table shares its columns so it fits 360px. Fixed a measured 41px post-search mobile overflow. responsive-check: desktop clean, mobile clean (0px).

guidanceConsulted.query: accessible loading/status live region and keyboard-operable gallery controls
guidanceConsulted.recommendation: role=status aria-live for async state; labelled keyboard controls; alt on images.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — loader + page status use role=status aria-live=polite; gallery tiles/chips/mode-toggle are <button>s with aria-labels and visible focus; all images have alt. conformance images-have-alt + buttons-have-names pass.

guidanceConsulted.recommendation: Use cross-document view transitions for catalogue↔page navigation.
guidanceConsulted.appliedOrException: applied — @view-transition navigation:auto in public/styles.css (invariant 6, shared design system).

openQuestions: Do nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 (CLS token) and nomic-embed-text-v1.5 (mean-pooled) align well enough for retrieval at q8 on WASM? (agent-verified: yes — every text query surfaces the semantically-correct image #1; image->text tagging and image->image similarity both rank correctly.)
Absolute cosines are small (~0.03-0.09); is the RANKING robust? (agent-verified: yes — the correct match wins by a clear margin over runners-up across queries.)

followUpGoals.goal: Add a matryoshka-dimension slider (truncate 768->256->128) to show the accuracy/size tradeoff, and a persisted IndexedDB vector index for larger galleries.

summary: Revision-1 agent matrix pass for nomic-embed-vision-v1-5 (image-feature-extraction / multimodal search, nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 + nomic-embed-text-v1.5, q8 WASM). Real cross-modal inference verified end-to-end on a no-GPU runner: text->image, image->text tagging, image->image similarity, semantic-axis, and a retrieve->caption multi-model pipeline all produce grounded output. Distinct capability: aligned Nomic image+text embeddings (CLIP-style retrieval) — a family not otherwise built (built embedders are text-only nomic-v1, or CLIP/SigLIP/DINOv2). Mobile+desktop responsive matrix clean (0px overflow both classes, light+dark). All auto-checkable conformance assertions pass; manual dimensions agent-verdicted from real e2e output.
